document.title: Software Development Plan for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev.0 software development plan for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector firmware/software.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines software development process, classification, requirements, risk management, verification and validation, release, configuration management, and problem resolution activities for the detector software.
keyPoints: The report identifies A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models.
The document applies FDA level-of-concern software classification and EN 62304 software safety class concepts.
The development process follows a classic waterfall methodology with analysis, planning, design, implementation, qualification, maintenance, release, and plan update stages.
Software requirements cover common functions, image acquisition, calibration, pre-processing, firmware update, firmware modules, cyber security, and error control.
Software release requires completed verification, residual abnormality documentation and assessment, release version documentation, and controlled storage/delivery procedures.

concepts.name: Software development plan
concepts.evidence: This activity constructs the software development plan. This plan outlines the tasks, responsibilities, resource, and other items pertinent to the specific development project.

concepts.name: FDA Level of Concern
concepts.evidence: S/W is classified into Major, Moderate and Minor by its level of concern

concepts.name: EN 62304 software safety class
concepts.evidence: The software safety classes shall initially be assigned based on concern as follows: -. Class A : There is no injury nor health damage. -. Class B : The possible harm is non-serious injury. -. Class C : The possible harm is death or serious injury.

concepts.name: Classic waterfall methodology
concepts.evidence: Software development process of H&abyz Co., Ltd. follows “Classic waterfall methodology"

concepts.name: Software risk management
concepts.evidence: As for the software risk management, personnel who participated in the program development process shall decide, analyze potential risk, reason, probability and severity of the software.

concepts.name: Software verification and validation
concepts.evidence: Software verification and validation shall be confirmed through the software test. The software test shall conduct the unit test, integration and system test.

concepts.name: Software configuration management
concepts.evidence: In case the software configuration is changed, it should be validated before it is applied to the software.

evidence.claim: The document is a Rev.0 software development plan for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Software Development Plan for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Report No.: A-TCF-5-143 (Rev.0)

evidence.claim: Revision 0 was dated 2022.07.01 and described as a new installation.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision history Rev. 0 Revision date 2022.07.01 Page 18 The reason & content for establishment and amendment New Installation
evidence.pageTarget: Software Development Plan A-TCF-5-143 Revision History

evidence.claim: The plan purpose is to develop software to manipulate and utilize product functions for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: To use the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector developed, produced and sold by this company according to intention, it aims at developing software that can manipulate and utilize the product function.

evidence.claim: The software is classified under FDA guideline levels of concern as Major, Moderate, and Minor.
evidence.evidenceText: S/W is classified into Major, Moderate and Minor by its level of concern

evidence.claim: The document uses EN 62304 software safety classes A, B, and C based on harm severity.
evidence.evidenceText: The software safety classes shall initially be assigned based on concern as follows: -. Class A : There is no injury nor health damage. -. Class B : The possible harm is non-serious injury. -. Class C : The possible harm is death or serious injury.

evidence.claim: The software development process follows classic waterfall methodology.
evidence.evidenceText: Software development process of H&abyz Co., Ltd. follows “Classic waterfall methodology", as illustrated in the following chart.

evidence.claim: The development schedule includes analysis from 2022.07.01 to 2022.07.15 and software release from 2022.11.15 to 2022.11.22.
Hardware resources list the MCU function as a 32Bit Microprocessor and MCU model as Intel Cyclone V.
evidence.evidenceText: Hardware resources Section Resource MCU Function 32Bit Microprocessor MCU Model Intel Cyclone V

evidence.claim: Software resources include Windows 7/10 32Bit/64bit and Microsoft Visual Studio 2019 C++/Cross-tool-gcc C, C++.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation system Windows 7/10 32Bit/64bit Compiler Microsoft Visual Studio 2019 C++/ Cross-tool-gcc C, C++

evidence.claim: Software functional requirements include common functions, image acquisition, calibration, pre-processing, and firmware update modules.
evidence.evidenceText: Common functions Module ... Image acquisition Module ... Calibration Module ... Pre-Processing Module ... Firmware Update Module

evidence.claim: Cyber security requirements include limiting random wireless access by ID/password and protecting transmission data with encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, and WPAPSK+TKIP.
evidence.evidenceText: Random access should be limited by setting ID and password when accessing the wireless network. Transmission data should be protected by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: Software risk management requires participants to decide and analyze potential risk, reason, probability, and severity.
evidence.evidenceText: As for the software risk management, personnel who participated in the program development process shall decide, analyze potential risk, reason, probability and severity of the software.

evidence.claim: If risk remains in the non-acceptable zone after measures to reduce or remove risk, design work must stop.
evidence.evidenceText: If the risk still remains on the non-acceptable zone even after taking measures to reduce or remove the risk, stop the design work.

evidence.claim: Software verification and validation are confirmed through software tests including unit, integration, and system tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Software verification and validation shall be confirmed through the software test. The software test shall conduct the unit test, integration and system test.

evidence.claim: Before software release, verification completion and evaluation of results must be ensured.
evidence.evidenceText: It should be ensured that the software verification is completed and that the results are evaluated before releasing the software.

evidence.claim: Software release documentation must include the released software version and procedures/environment used to create deployed software.
evidence.evidenceText: The version of the software product being deployed should be documented. The procedures and environment used to create the deployed software should be documented.

evidence.claim: Configuration management distinguishes upgrades by Major, Minor, and Internal management version names.
evidence.evidenceText: In case the software upgrade have settled the performance improvement, application of the customer request and bug matter, etc, it should be able to distinguish by a version name and write as the following type. Major ... Minor ... Internal management

evidence.claim: Software changes must be validated before application.
evidence.evidenceText: In case the software configuration is changed, it should be validated before it is applied to the software.
